content:
Hi folks:

This has been my pending items for quite some times [1], which is also required for booting vGPU with GSP enabled patch series [2] (it now also have the prelude of enabling vGPU on Blackwell.)

Thanks to Gary's Io proejction patches (the later parts are recently posted), I rebased my changes on top of it.

It would be nice, I can get some review comments to start to roll the balls while Gary's patch review is on-going. :)

[1] https://lore.kernel.org/all/20260409185254.3869808-1-zhiw@nvidia.com/
[2] https://lore.kernel.org/all/20260313165336.935771-1-zhiw@nvidia.com/
[3] https://lore.kernel.org/all/20260323153807.1360705-1-gary@kernel.org/
Thanks for the reminder, I definitely need to check [2]. In the meantime, I left some comments on [1] that you might want to check
